Description: Include the SheetJS (xlsx.full.min.js) library from jsdelivr CDN in the HTML head.
Instruction: Insert the SheetJS script tag in the head.
ReplacementContent:
<!-- FontAwesome -->
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    
    <!-- SheetJS for Excel Import -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/xlsx@0.18.5/dist/xlsx.full.min.js"></script>
toolAction: Adding SheetJS dependency to HTML head
toolSummary: Edit head in teacher dashboard HTML
